message: New email from Martin Peers: The Briefing: Nvidia-OpenAI’s Partnership

metadata.subject: The Briefing: Nvidia-OpenAI’s Partnership
metadata.preview: OpenAI loves to make grand announcements. Earlier this year we had the hoopla about its Stargate data center venture, worth up to $500 billion. ͏ ‌     ­͏ ‌     ­͏ ‌     ­͏ ‌     ­͏ ‌     ­͏ ‌     ­͏
